title: Js_Leaves+ for Regions Unexplored
description: This resource pack improves the foliage in Regions Unexplored by adding volume to it.
body:
Replace the standard leaf model for a more enjoyable game with the Regions Unexplored mod.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c5ddf4b4b4f3551249b41843c5b587402d684c7.png)
